data.content: Implementation handoff: focusNotificationBeat + buildNotificationBeatFocusHref lift focus logic into a tested helper, classify workflow phase via workflowStatePhase + builtinProfileDescriptor, and force view=queues or view=active before navigating (single navigation, no extra click needed). Terminal phase fails loudly via FOOLERY NOTIFICATION BEAT FOCUS FAILURE. Branch foolery-18b6-notification-focus (commit 8a87993) pushed to origin. Playwright-validated on dev server: history->active (implementation beat foolery-18b6), finalcut->queues (ready_for_implementation beat foolery-f354), and already-on-active regression. Beat detail dialog visible in DOM in all three cases. bun run lint and bunx tsc --noEmit clean. Pre-existing install-launcher-path test failures are unrelated (environmental: port 3210 held by running installed runtime).
